ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_types" (
  "usrtypepk" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usrtypepk")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "usrkeypk" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "usrtypefk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user type */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for communication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "password_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usrkeypk"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_usrtypefk FOREIGN KEY ("usrtypefk") REFERENCES user_types ("usrtypepk")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "grpkeypk" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the group is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grpkeypk")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "usrkeypk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "grpkeypk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the group */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user joined the group */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user left the group (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the membership is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_usrkeypk FOREIGN KEY ("usrkeypk") REFERENCES users ("usrkeypk"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_grpkeypk FOREIGN KEY ("grpkeypk") REFERENCES groups ("grpkeypk")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "grpkeypk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the license */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the license is active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the license */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the license */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the license was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "usrkeypk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the license */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the license was assigned */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the license was revoked (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_assignments_usrkeypk FOREIGN KEY ("usrkeypk") REFERENCES users ("usrkeypk"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_assignments_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permissionpk" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permissionpk")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "usrkeypk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "grpkeypk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the group */,
  "permissionpk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permission */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was assigned */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was revoked (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_assignments_grpkeypk FOREIGN KEY ("grpkeypk") REFERENCES groups ("grpkeypk"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_assignments_permissionpk FOREIGN KEY ("permissionpk") REFERENCES permissions ("permissionpk"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_assignments_usrkeypk FOREIGN KEY ("usrkeypk") REFERENCES users ("usrkeypk")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "projectno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the project is active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projectno")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "usrkeypk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "projectno" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user joined the project */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user left the project (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the membership is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_memberships_projectno FOREIGN KEY ("projectno") REFERENCES projects ("projectno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_memberships_usrkeypk FOREIGN KEY ("usrkeypk") REFERENCES users ("usrkeypk")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_types" (
  "permission-typepk" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Short name to describe the permission */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission-typepk")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_rights" (
  "optionidpk" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "usrtypefk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user type */,
  "right" TEXT /* Right granted to the user type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the right is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the right was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the right */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optionidpk"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rights_usrtypefk FOREIGN KEY ("usrtypefk") REFERENCES user_types ("usrtypepk")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "usrkeypk" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_usrkeypk FOREIGN KEY ("usrkeypk") REFERENCES users ("usrkeypk")
)
